CERT MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO ANNETTA EPSTEIN
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT ANNETTE EPSTEIN RE WRONG SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-02-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-20-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE DENIED. CLERK SHALL SET FOR FURTHER HEARING AND TRIAL. CONTINUED FOR TRIAL TO 6/20/07 AT 10:00 A.M.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT EPSTEIN, ANNETTA FOREIGN CONSULTANTS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CORRECTED MOTION RULING: (NOV-09-07 RULING SHOWED INCORRECT FILING PARTY) MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT, FILED BY KORNIYENKO, IRINA IS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KORNIYENKO, IRINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOREIGN CONSULTANTS, INC. $570.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $685.00, DEFENDANT ANNETTA EPSTEIN DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
